data.name: Origin Story - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Taking place twenty years after the Metagen-92 virus – aka the “Superflu” – has swept the world and rendered many of its adult population superpowered or mutated, Origin Story follows a seemingly normal nineteen-year-old who in any other universe would be a popular and attractive prospect for most girls. But in this universe, his ability hasn't manifested yet. Shunned by most of his meta-gifted peers, he finds himself a hapless virgin on the lower rung of his college's social ladder, with only a few misfit friends by his side.

When he is targeted and violently attacked for reasons unknown to him, The Sisterhood – a government-backed team of celebrity superheroines and sex icons - comes to his aid. While under their care, The Sisterhood immediately recognize his worth and hidden charms. 

He soon finds himself juggling college life, his suddenly blossoming relationships with the women he keeps close, his curious involvement with The Sisterhood and one big secret that could determine whether this is the origin story of a hero, or a villain.

Origin Story is a story-heavy visual novel that balances the funny, the sad, the absurd, and the erotic in a blend of superhero drama and slice-of-life college comedy. With a diverse cast of sweet, engaging, and beautiful characters, you’ll never be without someone who piques your interest. Maybe you’ll want all of them. Perhaps they'll want you to have all of them, too.

Plus many other interesting side girls and minor characters.

Season 1 contains the first 8 Chapters of Origin Story.

  • Over 7500 in-game renders

  • Character-specific galleries featuring hundreds of special renders that are unlocked as you play

  • 240,000 words

  • 10-12 hours of gameplay

  • 173 Songs (including 3 made exclusively for Origin Story)

  • Branching narratives that are shaped by your decisions

  • Scene replay gallery

data.short_description: In a world where superpowers are the norm, what happens when yours are far from normal? When a team of celebrity superheroines pulls him suddenly into their world, they awaken powers that turns his once ordinary life upside down. Is this the origin story of a hero or a villain?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
